name: jhins-trip-planner
description: End-to-end trip planner: pre-trip prep (visa, currency, SIM, insurance), round-trip transport with booking windows and transfers, evidence-tiered hotels, weather-aware day-by-day itineraries with buffer times, route-fit dining with cuisine-diversity matrix and operating-status verification, destination-specific local specialties and souvenirs, categorized budget with 15% overage checkpoint, source-traceable recommendations (every price, schedule, rating cited), and three output modes (planning-only advice, guide redesign, or existing-page refactor with content preservation).
